purpose: Public follow-up package for Blockaid, wallet-security reviewers, and DEX interfaces after Blockaid requested more documentation about price volatility, LP lock status, supply concentration, and audit status.

blockaidContext.latestReviewerRequest: Blockaid requested a complete third-party audit report and noted price volatility, unlocked liquidity, and supply concentration as risk factors.
blockaidContext.currentPosition: GCA is not claiming third-party audit completion, LP lock, locked reserve, deep liquidity, price support, or security-vendor approval. This package asks reviewers to separate contract-level honeypot controls from disclosed market-structure risks.

priceVolatility.response: GCA has starter-depth liquidity, so swaps can have high price impact and volatile execution prices. Public materials disclose this and do not claim price stability or price support.

lpLock.response: No LP lock is currently claimed. GCA publishes a dedicated liquidity statement that records the unlocked LP boundary and the evidence required before any future LP lock claim can be made.

supplyConcentration.response: The 600,000,000 GCA owner-held reserve is publicly disclosed in a separate reserve wallet with two on-chain transfer proofs. The reserve is owner-controlled and not currently locked, vested, or multisig-controlled.

thirdPartyAudit.response: No third-party audit has been completed. GCA has published an internal technical report for reviewer triage, but it is not an independent audit from Certik, Hacken, Trail of Bits, or another audit provider.

reviewRequest.requestedOutcome: Please review whether any suspected-honeypot or transfer-blocking label can be separated from disclosed market-structure risks.

safeClaims: GCA source is verified on BaseScan.
GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 on Base Mainnet.
The contract has no post-deployment mint function, owner/admin role, proxy, blacklist, pause function, transfer tax, hidden fee, custody path, or withdrawal path.
GCA has published an internal technical report and reserve address statement for reviewer triage.
Price volatility, starter-depth liquidity, supply concentration, unlocked LP status, owner-controlled reserve status, and missing third-party audit are disclosed risks.
doNotClaim: Blockaid, MetaMask, Uniswap, or wallet-security approval before vendor confirmation
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
LP lock before a verifiable lock exists
locked reserve before on-chain custody changes
deep liquidity, price support, price stability, or return promises
